name: Indoor Golf RVA - Scott's Addition
address: 3920 W Broad St Suite 101, Richmond, VA 23230
about: Indoor Golf RVA is a 24/7 golf club featuring industry-leading simulators with Trackman technology. The venue offers over 400 courses from around the world, accessible to all skill levels with the goal of growing the game while keeping it fun. Membership options are available to fit various schedules and budgets, with packages including simulator bookings, guest access, and coaching opportunities. The facility operates as both a practice center and a social space for golfers looking to play, practice, or improve their game year-round.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Trackman 4 technology used by 86 of the top 100 golfers on tour
24/7 availability allowing for flexible practice and play schedules
Multiple membership tiers to fit various budgets and needs
Over 400 courses available for virtual play
Coaching options available using AI and professional expertise

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed, guests can bring their own food
BYOB allowed, guests can bring their own drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced radar system providing detailed ball and club tracking data

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own clubs. The facility provides Trackman simulators with hitting areas.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, guests are allowed to bring their own food and drinks (BYOB).

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round takes approximately 1 hour per person in your group.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility welcomes juniors and offers special pricing for beginners, making it accessible for young golfers.
